name: New user onboarding flow
description: Implement the first-run onboarding flow for new users who have just authenticated and belong to no household. Frontend-only flow (reuses existing backend endpoints). Steps: (1) Welcome screen — brief value-prop copy; (2) Household choice — 'Create a household' or 'Join via invite link'; (3a) Create path — household name + default currency form (calls POST /api/v1/households); (3b) Join path — invite token input or deep-link auto-fill (calls POST /api/v1/invitations/:token/accept); (4) Completion screen — surfaces three next-step CTAs: invite members, set monthly budget, add first expense via quick-add. Users who skip any step land in the main app in a usable state. Onboarding is skipped automatically when user already belongs to a household. Per docs/product-specs/new-user-onboarding.md.
